command: docker run --rm --entrypoint bash --device=/dev/kfd --device=/dev/dri --group-add video --ipc=host --network=host -e HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e ROCR_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -e CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0 -v /scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527:/workspace -w /workspace/sources/references/hipkittens/kernels/attn/gqa_backwards onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori -lc 'export PYTHONPATH=/workspace/sources/references/hipkittens/src/common/pyutils:${PYTHONPATH:-}; python3 /workspace/tools/dsv4_runtime_probe/probe_hipkittens_gqa_bwd_synth_lse.py --batch 1 --seq 4096 --heads 64 --kv-heads 8 --dim 128 --warmup 5 --iters 20'

interpretation.status: schedule donor validated, not a SharedKV promotion yet
interpretation.why_not_promoted: This times dense GQA backward with synthetic O/L, not the DSv4 sparse SharedKV backward contract. The next implementation must replace dense dK/dV stores with dOriKV plus sparse route-aware dCmpKV epilogue and then compare against the current C4 SharedKV gate.
